diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -22,11 +22,31 @@
         out = self.relu(out)

         return out

 

-class SpecializedMLP(nn.Module):

+class AttentionLayer(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, hidden_dim):

+        super(AttentionLayer, self).__init__()

+        self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim

+        self.query = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)

+        self.key = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)

+        self.value = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim)

+        self.softmax = nn.Softmax(dim=-1)

+        

+    def forward(self, x):

+        Q = self.query(x)

+        K = self.key(x)

+        V = self.value(x)

+        

+        attention_scores = torch.matmul(Q, K.transpose(-2, -1)) / (self.hidden_dim ** 0.5)

+        attention_weights = self.softmax(attention_scores)

+        

+        output = torch.matmul(attention_weights, V)

+        return output

+

+class AdvancedMLP(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, input_dim=124, output_dim=128, hidden_dims=[512, 512, 256]):

-        super(SpecializedMLP, self).__init__()

+        super(AdvancedMLP, self).__init__()

         

-        # Shared feature extractor

+        # Shared feature extractor with attention

         shared_layers = []

         shared_layers.append(nn.Linear(input_dim, hidden_dims[0]))

         shared_layers.append(nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dims[0]))

@@ -36,6 +56,8 @@
         # Add residual blocks for shared representation

         for i in range(len(hidden_dims)-1):

             shared_layers.append(ResidualBlock(hidden_dims[0]))

+            # Add attention layer after each residual block

+            shared_layers.append(AttentionLayer(hidden_dims[0]))

         

         self.shared_network = nn.Sequential(*shared_layers)

         

@@ -49,16 +71,18 @@
             nn.Linear(256, 60)

         )

         

-        # Humidity tendency (60 values) - giving more capacity

+        # Humidity tendency (60 values) - giving more capacity and attention

         self.humid_head = nn.Sequential(

             nn.Linear(hidden_dims[0], 512),  # Increased capacity

             nn.BatchNorm1d(512),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            AttentionLayer(512),

             nn.Linear(512, 256),

             nn.BatchNorm1d(256),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            AttentionLayer(256),

             nn.Linear(256, 60)

         )

         

@@ -68,6 +92,7 @@
             nn.BatchNorm1d(128),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            AttentionLayer(128),

             nn.Linear(128, 8)

         )
